triggers.name: on_project_owner_membership
triggers.activation: after insert or update of owner_profile_id

constraints.name: project_members_viewer_role_regime_check
constraints.expression:
(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

constraints.name: project_invites_viewer_role_regime_check
constraints.expression:
(role = 'viewer' and viewer_regime is not null)
    or (role <> 'viewer' and viewer_regime is null)

triggers.name: enforce_tasks_estimate_lineage_scope
triggers.activation: before insert or update of project_id, stage_id, estimate_work_id

constraints.expression:
linked_external_kind is null
           or linked_external_kind in ('workspace', 'org')

constraints.name: documents_link_consistent
constraints.expression:
(linked_external_kind is null
      and linked_workspace_document_id is null
      and linked_org_document_id is null)
    or (linked_external_kind = 'workspace'
      and linked_org_document_id is null)
    or (linked_external_kind = 'org'
      and linked_workspace_document_id is null)

triggers.name: guard_documents_visibility_class_change
triggers.activation: before insert or update of visibility_class

constraints.expression: not is_final or task_id is not null

triggers.name: guard_project_media_visibility_class_change
triggers.activation: before insert or update of visibility_class

constraints.expression:
execution_status is null
    or execution_status in ('planning', 'in_work', 'paused', 'finished')
client_vat_bps is null or (client_vat_bps >= 0 and client_vat_bps <= 10000)
markup_bps is null or (markup_bps >= 0 and markup_bps <= 10000)
discount_bps_override is null or (discount_bps_override >= 0 and discount_bps_override <= 10000)

columns.name: identity_key
columns.sqlType:
text
  generated always as (public.inventory_item_identity(title, notes, unit)) stored

triggers.name: on_inventory_movements_sync_balances
triggers.activation: after insert or update or delete

triggers.name: enforce_hr_item_estimate_lineage_scope
triggers.activation: before insert or update of project_id, estimate_work_id, estimate_resource_line_id, task_id

constraints.expression: not is_final or task_id is not null

triggers.name: on_organization_owner_membership
triggers.activation: after insert or update of owner_profile_id

constraints.name: estimate_templates_owner_id_consistency
constraints.expression:
(owner_kind = 'system' and owner_id is null)
      or (owner_kind = 'org' and owner_id is not null)
      or (owner_kind = 'profile' and owner_id is not null)
default_markup_bps is null or (default_markup_bps >= 0 and default_markup_bps <= 10000)
default_discount_bps is null or (default_discount_bps >= 0 and default_discount_bps <= 10000)

triggers.name: trg_normalize_org_document_folder_name
triggers.activation: before insert or update of name

constraints.name: payment_intents_parent_intent_consistency_check
constraints.expression:
case
      when is_recurrent_charge then parent_intent_id is not null
      else parent_intent_id is null
    end

constraints.name: blog_posts_published_has_timestamp
constraints.expression: status <> 'published' or published_at is not null
